title: PB-157 VERIFIED: USBAY Governed Vision Runtime Review

evidence: runtime/computer_use/desktop_driver.py returns DRY_RUN_NO_DESKTOP_MUTATION when default dry_run=True
runtime/computer_use/browser_driver.py returns DRY_RUN_NO_BROWSER_MUTATION when default dry_run=True
runtime/computer_use/providers/ contains no driver invocation
desktop_action_execution_path.risk_note: Execution classes exist in runtime/computer_use, but PB-156 provider layer does not invoke live desktop or browser mutation.

evidence: runtime/computer_use/screen_capture.py sets raw_screenshot_stored=false by default
runtime/computer_use/screen_capture.py raises RAW_SCREENSHOT_PERSISTENCE_DISABLED when persist_raw is false
runtime/computer_use/providers/base.py records raw_screenshot_stored=false
runtime/computer_use/providers/base.py redacts screen_text to screen_text_hash
provider audit event stores observation_hash, not raw screen_text
runtime/computer_use/providers/provider_factory.py defaults to mock provider
unknown and missing provider names return fail-closed unknown provider
provider layer proposes normalized actions only

docs/architecture/USBAY_GOVERNED_VISION_PROVIDER_LAYER.md states provider analysis does not bypass approval queue, approval token, approval expiration, deny path, replay protection, or runtime audit chain
approval_queue_bypass.risk_note: Provider layer itself does not call the approval queue because it does not execute actions. Downstream runtime approval enforcement remains required before any execution path.

evidence: runtime/computer_use/providers/base.py analyze_screen always returns through _record_and_return
exceptions are converted into fail-closed responses and recorded
provider missing, unknown, exception, timeout, malformed response, invalid observation, and high-risk missing approval marker all return FAIL_CLOSED
unknown action scenario returns BLOCK
grep requests returned no runtime network client import
grep http returned no runtime URL/client path
grep websocket returned no matches
No os.environ/getenv access found in provider layer
No API key loading found in provider layer
No while True loop found in provider layer
No subprocess/Popen path found in provider layer
No provider code invokes desktop or browser drivers
gemini_provider.py, openai_provider.py, and claude_provider.py contain provider_name/provider_version future-boundary classes only
provider_factory.py does not route gemini/openai/claude to live providers
future_provider_files.risk_note: These files should remain unreachable until a separately reviewed live-provider PB authorizes activation.

validation.summary: Provider references are base/mock/factory/future-boundary metadata and evidence documentation.
Raw screenshot references set or document raw_screenshot_stored=false; disabled persistence raises by default.
Approval references document or implement approval queue/token/deny/replay boundaries; provider layer does not execute.
Provider base records audit metadata for every decision path.
No requests network library usage found.
Only inert openai provider_name boundary references found.
Only inert gemini provider_name boundary references found.

remaining_gaps: Review is static and local-only; no production execution was attempted.
Full repository test suite was not requested or run for PB-157.
Future Gemini/OpenAI/Claude boundary files must remain unreachable until separately approved.
